translation.Sobre parte 1: Front-end developer with extensive experience in modern web development technologies such as JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Svelte, Vue, and Lit. I have a strong passion for UI/UX, ensuring that every interface I develop not only meets technical standards but also provides a seamless user experience. My career has been focused on creating efficient and scalable interfaces, with an emphasis on standardization and maintenance of design systems. Additionally, I have experience in complex environments such as SAPUI5 and WordPress, delivering robust and integrated projects.
translation.projeto_incrivel:
Do you have an Amazing Project
in mind? Let's talk

work_experience.description: As a front-end developer, I work on developing a robust design system using Lit, focusing on accessibility and user experience. I maintain the company's component library, providing reusable and practical solutions to facilitate developers' work. Additionally, I use Vue.js in other projects to create efficient and integrated interfaces.

As a senior developer, I worked with ReactJS and Svelte in developing interactive interfaces, applying best design practices to create engaging experiences. I also managed a team of junior developers, providing support and technical guidance to ensure project quality and efficiency.

I used SAPUI5 for the development of robust enterprise applications, FIORI to test and improve user experience, and implemented DEVOPS practices to ensure the quality and efficiency of the development process.

I worked with ReactJS, using agile methodologies and tools like Trello for project management in Kanban format. I also performed design work using Photoshop and Figma to create user interfaces (UI) and user experience (UX).
During my internship, I improved my skills in ReactJS and prototype development using Figma, applying UI and UX concepts in creating intuitive and attractive interfaces.

I worked as a UFPE scholarship holder, playing an important role in front-end development and web design. I was responsible for creating interactive and responsive interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, as well as developing UX strategies to provide a quality user experience.

footer.description: Developing interfaces that make life easier for users and maintainers. If you have a cool project, let's talk.
